items.title: Programming and ICT Instructor (Part-time)
items.summary: Deliver instructor-led Python and ICT training for beginner-to-intermediate learners.
responsibilities: Teach programming fundamentals, object-oriented programming, data handling, and introductory analysis with pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib.
Prepare structured lesson plans, practical coding exercises, assignments, and debugging activities.
Provide individual guidance, actionable feedback, and certification-preparation support.

items.title: Research Assistant (PhD Research - Privacy-Preserving RAG)
items.summary: Research and implement privacy-preserving multimodal RAG for higher education.
responsibilities: Design document-intelligence workflows spanning OCR, parsing, chunking, embeddings, retrieval, re-ranking, grounding, and guardrails.
Plan and evaluate experiments involving digital documents, scanned content, tables, and multimodal inputs.
Prepare research reports and manuscripts on RAG, multimodal AI, privacy-aware systems, and higher-education applications.

items.title: Software Development Consultant (Part-time, Remote)
items.summary: Developed and supported backend services and integration components for enterprise applications.
responsibilities: Designed and maintained REST APIs, backend modules, and microservice-style integrations.
Improved reliability and performance through profiling, SQL optimization, log analysis, monitoring, and production troubleshooting.
Collaborated through Agile planning, code reviews, technical documentation, and maintainable software delivery.

items.title: Software Development Manager (Remote)
items.summary: Led a six-member engineering team delivering enterprise software solutions.
responsibilities: Managed task planning, technical reviews, delivery priorities, and engineering quality across Java and Spring Boot applications.
Guided modernization of legacy components toward modular services with clearer ownership and maintainability.
Improved team workflows through documentation standards, issue tracking, and structured development processes.

items.title: Software Development Manager
items.summary: Managed enterprise content-management and process-automation delivery.
responsibilities: Supervised a five-member team building solutions with Java and OpenText Documentum.
Directed requirement analysis, project planning, technical execution, and product delivery for enterprise clients.
Coordinated Agile delivery and automated document workflows to improve efficiency, compliance support, and turnaround time.
